task_completion.description: Navigate to the Tax Management settings in Vtiger CRM.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Vtiger CRM settings page for 'Tax Management' or 'Inventory Taxes' is visible in the web browser.
A tax named 'GST' is visible in the 'Product & Service Taxes' list with a value of 5%.
A tax named 'PST' is visible in the 'Product & Service Taxes' list with a value of 7%.

task_completion.description: Add 'Shipping GST' to Shipping & Handling Taxes.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A tax named 'Shipping GST' is visible in the 'Shipping & Handling Taxes' list with a value of 5%.

task_completion.description: Navigate to the Terms and Conditions settings in Vtiger CRM.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Vtiger CRM settings page for 'Terms and Conditions' or 'Inventory Terms' is visible in the web browser.

task_completion.description: Update the global Terms and Conditions text.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Terms and Conditions text area contains the updated text, specifically including the phrase 'International shipments may be subject to customs duties and delays'.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the Vtiger CRM web interface to configure the settings.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show interaction with the Vtiger CRM web UI, not terminal commands (like mysql) or API scripts.

integrity.description: Verify the changes were made in the actual Vtiger CRM application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser address bar should show the correct URL for Vtiger CRM, not a local text editor or unrelated site.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not use browser developer tools to fake the visual output.
integrity.visual_evidence: Browser developer tools (Inspect Element) should not be open or used to modify the DOM to display the expected tax values or terms.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target values for the taxes are: GST = 5.0%, PST = 7.0%, and Shipping GST = 5.0%. The Terms and Conditions must contain the phrase 'international shipments may be subject to customs duties and delays' (case-insensitive).
